analysis_pending_desc: Click 'Analyze' to initialize deep performance auditing on this session.
analysis_required_desc: Initialize analysis to generate performance metrics.
analyzing_started_desc: Your workout is being analyzed by AI. This may take a minute...
impact_atl_desc: ATL (Fatigue): Exponentially weighted average of your daily TSS over 7 days. It reflects current physiological strain.
impact_ctl_desc: CTL (Fitness): Exponentially weighted average of your daily TSS over 42 days. It models your training load sustainability.
impact_source_intervals: This data is synced directly from {link}.
impact_source_local: This data is calculated locally based on your workout intensity.
impact_tsb_desc: TSB (Form): Simply CTL - ATL. A positive TSB indicates you are tapered and ready for peak performance.
impact_tss_desc: TSS (Training Stress Score): Measures the physiological cost of a ride. 100 points is roughly equivalent to 1 hour at your threshold power (FTP).
level_up_desc: Based on your performance in this workout, your {label} has improved. Updating your threshold ensures your training zones and stress stats remain accurate.
level_up_sync_note: Updates sync to Coach Watts and Intervals.icu. Don't forget to manually update Garmin Connect to align your watch zones.
modal_delete_sync_note_desc: Deleting this workout here will NOT delete it from the original source ({source}). It may be re-imported during the next sync unless deleted there as well.
modal_promote_action_desc: This action will swap the primary status. The current primary workout will become a duplicate of this one.
modal_promote_desc: This will make the current workout the primary version.
modal_share_desc: Create a read-only link to this workout and share it directly to social platforms.
nutrition_adjustment_desc: Session was significantly harder than prescribed (+{delta}% kJ). Recommending {carbs}g additional carbohydrates over the next 4 hours.
publish_summary_success: Workout summary has been added to Intervals.icu notes
version_duplicate_desc: This workout has been identified as a duplicate of another activity. The primary version is likely from a more preferred source.
version_linked_desc: Merged sessions identified as duplicates of this activity.
version_prescribed_desc: This activity successfully completed the following planned workout.
